title: Midnight Blade Crunch
description: A nutty, crunchy American dish featuring feather blade beef, boiled in a plant-based friendly sauce, perfect for satisfying midnight cravings.
instructions: Boil Feather Blade Beef in water with pepperoni, garlic powder, and salt for about 1 hour.
Drain the beef carefully to prevent splashes. Allow it to cool slightly before proceeding.
Crush the cooled beef into small chunks using a fork or your hands.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add crushed beef and cook until evenly browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer cooked beef to a serving dish. Serve immediately for best crunch texture.
